levels.en: Summons a flower of desire that lasts [[5]]s. While active, the flower causes all enemies to take <ATK>[[40%]] true damage every second, while reducing damage taken by [[15%]] for allies. When the flower expires, it restores HP to all allies equal to <ATK>[[150%]] plus [[50%]] of the damage dealt by this skill, and deals <ATK>[[100%]] true damage to all enemies.
levels.zh: 召唤持续[[5]]秒的欲望之花，持续期间内所有敌人每秒受到<ATK>[[40%]]的真实伤害，并且己方受到伤害降低[[15%]]，持续时间结束时为所有友军恢复相当于<ATK>[[150%]]外加相当于该技能造成伤害量[[50%]]的生命值，并对所有敌人造成<ATK>[[100%]]的真实伤害。

levels.en: While active, increases all enemies' true damage taken per second to <ATK>[[45%]].
levels.zh: 持续期间所有敌人每秒受到的真实伤害提升至<ATK>[[45%]]。

levels.en: While the flower of desire is active, all allies gain [[30]] Haste.
levels.zh: 欲望之花持续期间，所有友军提高[[30]]点急速。

levels.en: Aurelian signs a contract with the rearmost ally and the [[3]] rearmost enemies, causing Aurelian and that ally to lose [[1%]] of their current HP. He then steals [[8%]] ATK from each contracted enemy, granting it to himself and the ally for [[8]]s. This bonus ATK gained from this skill cannot exceed [[24%]] of Aurelian's initial ATK.
levels.zh: 与最靠后的友军以及最靠后的[[3]]名敌人签订契约，使自身和友军失去[[1%]]当前生命值，偷取契约中每名敌人[[8%]]攻击力，持续[[8]]秒。自身及友军通过该技能提高的攻击力总计不超过自身初始攻击力的[[24%]]。

levels.en: Increases ATK stolen from each contracted enemy to [[10%]]. The ATK gained by Aurelian and the ally from this skill cannot exceed [[30%]] of Aurelian's initial ATK.
levels.zh: 契约中的每名敌人被偷取的攻击力提升至[[10%]]，自身及友军因此提高的攻击力不超过自身初始攻击力的[[30%]]。

levels.en: Increases ATK stolen from each contracted enemy to [[12%]]. The ATK gained by Aurelian and the ally from this skill cannot exceed [[36%]] of Aurelian's initial ATK.
levels.zh: 契约中的每名敌人被偷取的攻击力提升至[[12%]]，自身及友军因此提高的攻击力不超过自身初始攻击力的[[36%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[8%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[8%]], and ATK by [[4%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[8%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[8%]]，攻击力提升[[4%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[16%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[16%]], and ATK by [[8%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[16%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[16%]]，攻击力提升[[8%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[24%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[24%]], and ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[24%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[24%]]，攻击力提升[[12%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[32%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[32%]], and ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[32%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[32%]]，攻击力提升[[16%]]。

levels.en:
Aurelian applies [[Spirit Mark]] to an allied hero behind, granting them Soulpact.
Soulpact: The [[spirit-marked hero]]'s normal attack damage increases by [[20%]]. 
When Aurelian's normal attack hits an enemy, it channels the impact to the [[spirit-marked hero]], healing the [[spirit-marked hero]] for [[50%]] of the damage dealt. When Aurelian casts Unfair Contract, he prioritizes the [[spirit-marked hero]] as the allied target.
levels.zh:
使身后1名友方英雄成为[[灵能者]]，获得“契约”之灵能：[[灵能者]]的普通攻击造成的伤害提升[[20%]]。
奥瑞利安的普通攻击命中敌人后会弹射至[[灵能者]]，为[[灵能者]]回复相当于该次伤害量[[50%]]的生命值；同时奥瑞利安释放非对称契约时优先选择[[灵能者]]作为友军目标。

levels.en: Aurelian and the [[spirit-marked hero]] increase their ATK SPD by [[15]] and Crit by [[20]]. Unfair Contract also steals an extra [[5]] ATK SPD from each contracted enemy.
levels.zh: 奥瑞利安和[[灵能者]]的攻击速度提高[[15]]点，暴击提高[[20]]；同时非对称契约还会额外偷取每名目标敌人[[5]]点攻击速度。

levels.en: Aurelian targets the [[2]] weakest allies, granting them a shield equal to <ATK>[[350%]] for [[8]]s. While the shield is active, he increases their Phys & Magic DEF by [[30%]]. If multiple allies have the same HP ratio, Aurelian prioritizes those positioned closer to the front.
levels.zh: 以[[2]]名最虚弱的友军为目标，为其添加相当于<ATK>[[350%]]的护盾，持续[[8]]秒，护盾存在期间使其护甲和魔抗提高[[30%]]，生命值比例相同时，优先选择更靠前的友军。
